svg.style: display: inline; visibility: visible; opacity: 1; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 1; fill-rule: nonzero; stroke: none; stroke-opacity: 1; stroke-width: 1px; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-dashoffset: 0px; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; paint-order: normal; vector-effect: none; color: rgb(33, 37, 41); font-family: Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; letter-spacing: normal; text-anchor: start; dominant-baseline: auto; alignment-baseline: auto; white-space: normal;
